title: picris damascena subsp. blancheana
intro: Picris damascena subsp. blancheana, also known as Syrian scabious, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the mountains of the Levant region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Picris damascena subsp. blancheana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Traditionally, it is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and combat certain diseases.
